notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 4 CVEs: CVE-2026-31684, CVE-2026-46209, CVE-2026-46189, CVE-2026-64600.
